name: initial JS (gz) — Preact + signals + Overview + Nav + AppShell + Login + multi-metric chart wiring + ECharts theme reader. Bumped 19→20 KB when filters.ts gained the segments Phase-3 scope-prop maps (HitProps/SessionProps/UserProps + setPropFilter/removePropFilter/hasAnyPropFilter helpers + filtersToQuery handling of repeated <scope>_prop URL params). +45 B gz net; budget headroom kept. Compare panel itself ships in its own lazy chunk.

ECharts chart chunk (gz) — LineChart + BarChart + PieChart + Grid/Tooltip/Legend/Aria/Title + CanvasRenderer. Bumped 25→200 KB during the uPlot→ECharts migration: ECharts' tree-shakeable custom build still ships the ZRender renderer + shared coords/animation/util core, which lands at ~190 KB gz regardless of which chart types you import (research #74 scenario C — verdict: 'reject on bundle grounds' — explicitly overridden by user choice to standardize on one library).

lazy panel chunks (gz) — Sources/Pages/SEO/Campaigns/Realtime/Admin + TrendChart/DualBar/CampaignCharts. ECharts migration kept this at 20 KB: custom-SVG donut math + horizontal-bar SVG code removed (~3 KB gz savings), ECharts option-builder helpers in lib/chart.ts moved to the initial chunk (~1 KB), net wash.

cally calendar chunk (gz) — dynamic-imported only when the Custom date-range popover opens. Cally + atomico ≈ 13 KB gz; 20 KB ceiling covers tree-shake variance and a minor-version bump (Cally still 0.9.x, pinned exact in package.json until 1.0 lands).

statnive-spa.css (gz) — tokens + reset + AppShell + components + @font-face rules (Phase 5e, fonts are separate WOFF2 assets). Bumped 5→6 KB when DatePicker.css gained the popover shell + Cally ::part() theming + mode-toggle + From/To echo + Apply button + mobile bottom-sheet styles.

per-panel CSS chunks (gz) — Admin + panels + Chart + Campaigns. ECharts migration shrunk this back toward 6 KB: donut SVG positioning + hbar styles + uPlot cursor overrides all deleted. DualBar CSS unchanged (DualBar kept as pure CSS, not migrated).
